message:
feat(iter,linalg): extend iterator combinators and linalg adjustments, refresh RaptorQ and conformance artifacts

Expand the iterator combinator library with additional chaining and
windowing utilities. Refresh RaptorQ bundle artifacts and conformance
differential reports to reflect current test corpus state.

- fnp-iter/src/lib.rs: add new iterator combinators for windowed
  operations and chain extensions
- fnp-linalg/src/lib.rs: minor linalg adjustment
- artifacts/raptorq: regenerate all bundle artifacts (benchmark and
  conformance) with updated sidecar, decode_proof, and scrub_report
- conformance/oracle_outputs: update ufunc_differential_report.json
  and ufunc_differential_mismatch_report.json with current pass/fail
  counts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
